en.title: Configurations
en.lead: Review the configurations available for your workspace.
en.table.title: Available configurations
en.table.description: Browse existing configurations and manage them when needed.
en.table.columns.name: Name
en.update.header.lead: Select a category below to update its routing rules.
en.update.categories.title: Categories
en.update.categories.subtitle: Choose a category to review its configured actions.
en.update.categories.empty: This configuration does not have any categories yet.
en.update.categories.createDrawer.title: Create category
en.update.categories.createDrawer.descripti: Fill in the category details to get started.
en.category.update.header.title: Edit category
en.category.update.details.title: General information
en.category.update.details.descriptionPlace: Describe which emails belong in this category and why they fit.
en.category.update.actions.title: Automation
en.category.update.actions.subtitle: Pick the action that should run for emails in this category.
en.category.update.actions.assign_categorie: Select the category that should be attached to the email.
en.category.update.actions.forward_to.label: Forward to
en.category.update.actions.forward_to.helpe: Set the email address that should receive a forward copy.
en.category.update.actions.reply_with_messa: Draft the automatic reply that will be sent.
en.category.actions.title: Configured actions
en.category.actions.dialog.assign_categorie: Choose the category to attach when the email is classified.
en.category.actions.dialog.move_to_folder.d: Decide where to move the email after classification.
en.category.actions.dialog.forward_to.title: Forward to
en.category.actions.dialog.forward_to.descr: Forward the email to one or more recipients.
en.category.actions.dialog.reply_with_messa: Craft the automatic reply that will be sent.
Write the automatic reply that will be sent to the sender.
en.createDialog.title: Create a new configuration
en.createDialog.description: Name your configuration. You can adjust details later.
en.createDialog.helperText: You'll be able to link emails and categories after creation.

fr.title: Configurations
fr.lead: Consultez les configurations disponibles pour votre espace de travail.

fr.table.description: Parcourez les configurations existantes et gérez-les si nécessaire.
fr.table.columns.name: Nom
fr.actions.open: Ouvrir le menu des actions de configuration

fr.update.categories.subtitle: Choisissez une catégorie pour examiner ses actions configurées.

fr.update.categories.createDrawer.editDescr: Mettez à jour les informations de la catégorie.

fr.category.update.details.title: Informations générales
fr.category.update.details.descriptionPlace: Décrivez quels emails doivent appartenir à cette catégorie et pourquoi ils y correspondent.
fr.category.update.actions.title: Automatisation
fr.category.update.actions.subtitle: Choisissez l'action à exécuter pour les emails de cette catégorie.

fr.category.update.actions.forward_to.helpe: Définissez l'adresse email qui recevra une copie.

fr.category.actions.dialog.forward_to.descr: Transférez l'email à un ou plusieurs destinataires.
